summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Location Editor and Google Photos features. All 50 backend tests pass. Frontend LocationEditor works correctly - clicking city name opens search, searching 'Los Angeles' returns results, selecting city updates location and shows 'Visiting' badge. Google Photos are displayed for both places feed and dispensaries.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/places/search-city returns cities with coordinates for 'Los Angeles'
Backend: /api/places/search-city returns cities for 'New York'
Backend: /api/places/search-city returns cities for international cities (Tokyo)
Backend: /api/places/search-city handles empty query gracefully
Backend: /api/places/search-city handles gibberish query gracefully
Backend: /api/places/reverse-geocode returns city name for LA coordinates
Backend: /api/places/reverse-geocode returns city name for NYC coordinates
Backend: /api/places/ returns Google Photos URLs (googleapis.com)
Backend: /api/places/ returns required fields (id, name, coordinates, rating)
Backend: /api/cannabis/dispensaries returns Google Photos URLs
Backend: /api/cannabis/dispensaries returns required fields (shop_id, name, city)
Backend: /api/cannabis/dispensaries includes distance_m, walk_mins, drive_mins
Backend: /api/places/location returns neighborhood and city
Frontend: Clicking city name in header opens LocationEditor
Frontend: LocationEditor shows search input with placeholder 'Search city or address...'
Frontend: LocationEditor shows 'Use current location' option with GPS label
Frontend: Searching 'Los Angeles' returns city results
Frontend: Selecting Los Angeles updates location in header
Frontend: 'Visiting' badge appears in amber color when using custom location
Frontend: Feed shows 20+ Google Places photos (googleapis.com URLs)
Frontend: Cannabis/Weeds page Spots tab shows 30 dispensary cards
Frontend: Dispensary cards show real Google Photos of storefronts
Frontend: 29 Google API images found in dispensaries view
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location Editor and Google Photos features are fully implemented and working. LocationEditor component is integrated in Home.jsx header. Backend uses Google Places API for photos with caching. All APIs return real Google Photos URLs. Test user testuser@test.com/test123 can be used for authenticated testing.

location_editor.click_to_open: Working - clicking city name opens search field
location_editor.select_city: Working - selecting city updates location and triggers feed refresh
location_editor.visiting_badge: Working - amber 'Visiting' badge appears for custom locations
location_editor.use_current_location: Working - GPS option available in dropdown

google_photos.places_feed: Working - 20+ Google Photos displayed in home feed
google_photos.dispensaries: Working - 29 Google Photos displayed in Spots tab
google_photos.caching: Implemented - photo references cached in backend

api_endpoints./api/places/reverse-geocode: Working - returns city name from GPS
api_endpoints./api/places/: Working - returns places with Google Photos
api_endpoints./api/cannabis/dispensaries: Working - returns dispensaries with Google Photos
